title: High diamagnetic graphite solar engine - part 1
description: Where I am heading with this is a solar driven graphite engine. A good source of cheap graphite is http://www.ebay.co.uk/itm/221225840441 It works because of the unusual properties of the graphite I used which can be got from writing to http://graphite.com.co/contact-us/ - but be sure to ask for their VOC graphite. I am not sure if they actually sell it via their shop as I was sent it as an analytical sample - you don't want the normal stuff. I was directed to http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AJ7fMVp_O5s by a good friend of mine nativerivers. It's from a research group in Japan who use HOPG - I am going to be using this natural graphite to reproduce the same effect at a fraction of the cost!
